name: FIGS, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Our mission is to celebrate, empower and serve those who serve others. We are a founder-led, direct-to-consumer healthcare apparel and lifestyle brand that seeks to celebrate, empower and serve current and future generations of healthcare professionals. We are committed to helping this growing, global community of professionals, whom we refer to as Awesome Humans, look, feel and perform at their best24/7, 365 days a year.
